TestCase z14Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: reverse the entire array
    int i = 0;
    int j = follow_case.n - 1;
    while (i < j) {
        double temp = follow_case.a[i];
        follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[j];
        follow_case.a[j] = temp;
        ++i;
        --j;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
